finalAssistantMessages.text: The merged queue validates cleanly: 36 result files, 175 result items, and all 175 queue items are now `described`. Running the production Docker import now.

Production import succeeded: 175 imported, 0 skipped. I’m doing a final repo-scope status check so I can hand this back cleanly and not accidentally report ignored operational artifacts as source changes.

Done. I ran the production May queue: `yarn prepare-image-description-queue:prod --month=2026-05` Then followed the generated instructions with subagents across all 36 batches. The merged queue now has 175/175 items marked `described`, with 0 needing human review: [2026-05-image-description-queue.json](/Users/microwavedev/workspace/microwave-hub/artist-helper/data/content/analysis/image-descriptions/2026-05-image-description-queue.json) I also ran the production Docker import variant. Result: `Image descriptions imported: 175` `Skipped: 0` `artist-helper` has no tracked source changes; the generated queue/results live under ignored `data/content`, so there was nothing to commit or push.
